name: kol-design-system
description: KOL (Kolkrabbi) design system — the single maintenance home for the published @kolkrabbi/kol-* packages, plus the showcase app. Source of truth; consumers install published versions (no linking).

scripts.extract:docs: node scripts/extract-docs-meta.mjs && node scripts/extract-api.mjs && node scripts/extract-composition.mjs
